MINI MINUTES:
Petition for relief from forfeiture -- off calendar. Stipulation to remove from calendar filed on May 10, 2002. (JJM) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855

To Complete Hearing On Petition For Relief From Forfeiture
Off Calendar May-07-2002 Continued To May-14-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Kimberly Ryan, Certified Student of HOMELESS ADVOCACY PROJECT 575-3130 for defendant EDGAR GEDDLING JR. petitioning for relief against forfeiture
Arnold W. Evje, II, Esq. 673-6070 for Plaintiff and opposing party Robert A Imhoff

Argued and the Court continued the stay and this hearing until May 14, 2002, and 9:30- a.m. in Department 301. Notice waived. Stay conditioned on payment of one week rent to landlord. Declarations due by close of business on May 13, 2002. (JJM/CL) Reporter: Joyce Long, CSR # 3620

MOTION To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment; Exhibit A In Support Of Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Ted Janowsky, Esq. and Kimberly Ryan, Certified Studen of HOMELESS ADVOCACY PROJECT 575-3130 for defendant EDGAR GEDDLING JR. petitioning for relief against forfeiture
Arnold W. Evje, II, Esq. 673-6070 for Plaintiff and opposing party

Argued andthe Court took the matter under submission. (JJM/cl) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855

Off Calendar May-14-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Ted Janowsky, Esq. and Kimberly Ryan, Certified Studen of HOMELESS ADVOCACY PROJECT 575-3130 for defendant EDGAR GEDDLING JR. moving to set aside default and default judgment.
Arnold W. Evje, II, Esq. 673-6070 for Plaintiff and opposing party

Argued andthe Court took the matter under submission. (JJM/cl) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855

MOTION To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment; Exhibit A In Support Of Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-23-2002 Continued To Apr-30-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ted Janowsky, Esq., and Kimberly Ryan, Certified Law Student, VOLUNTEER LEGAL SERVICES PROGRAM, 415-575-3130, appeared on behalf of defendant and moving party Edgar J. Geddling. Arnold W. Evje, II, Esq. ATTORNEY AT LAW 415-495-8800 appeared on behalf of plaintiff and opposing party Robert A. Imhoff.

After argument Edgar J. Geddling's motion to set aside default and default judgment was denied. Parties agreed that upon payment of a $45 a stay of eviction would be in place until April 30, 2002. Hearing was set for April 30, 2002. (JJM/CL) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR # 7855

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-08-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Defendant GEDDLING's demurrer is O F F C A L E N D A R -- First Amended Complaint filed on 3/22/02. (JJM) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
